name: Foot Changes
preceding_figure_names: Any figure ending in Closed Position with weight on LF (Lady RF)
notes: Bronze Level figure. Man uses Foot Changes (minimal Bounce) to achieve Right Shadow Position while Lady dances 1-3 of Spot Volta turning 1/2 L (LRL). Alternative method: turn Lady under raised L arm and then change to R Shadow hold.

steps.action: Replace weight to RF leading Lady to turn L and releasing hold
comments: Man leads Lady to turn left and releases hold

steps.action: Hold position with weight on RF
LF diagonally forward, small step; take R Shadow hold at end of Lady's turn
Perform 1-3 of Spot Volta turning 1/2 L (LRL)
